intro: Master CELPIP Speaking with this full practice session!
Watch, listen, and shadow your way to a higher band score.
tips: Pause after each sentence and repeat out loud.
Use the shadowing section to improve fluency and pronunciation.
Review the vocabulary cards to expand your range.
